title: Australia news live: Jonathon Duniam to retire from politics; father and daughter found dead in Sydney river
summary:
The Tasmanian Liberal senator has announced he will leave parliament before the end of the year. title: SpaceX blasts off with a record-breaking $75 billion IPO
summary: Elon Musk's rocket company, recently merged with xAI, raised $75 billion in its initial public stock offering. It's the first of a trio of mega-IPOs from AI companies expected this year.

title: The Guardian view on the analogue resurgence: the shock of the old | Editorial
summary: Long-abandoned formats such as cassettes and VHS tapes are finding new life as consumers seek a digital detoxTen years after the last video recorder manufacturer ceased production, the first straight-to-video movie for two decades – This Is How the World Ends – was released this month. title: Billions spent and hypothetical returns: the AI boom explained with six charts
